content.text:
DONE.

**Summary:**

- `cargo build` succeeded with 0 errors (3 pre-existing dead-code warnings, unchanged)
- Claude binary found at `/Users/4thwithme/.local/bin/claude` (version 2.1.92). Updated `find_claude_binary()` to check `~/.local/bin/claude` first, then fall back to the `~/.claude/local/` path from the spec, then `/usr/local/bin/`, then PATH
- `spawn_agent` signature changed from `(tab_id, AgentConfig, event_tx)` to `(tab_id, cwd, model, event_tx)` — only one call site in `main.rs`, updated cleanly
- The API key conditional block in `main.rs` is gone; agent always spawns unconditionally using the CLI client
- `settings` is still loaded (used for `default_model`)

**Files changed:**
- `/Users/4thwithme/Documents/repo/clui/rust/crates/agent/src/cli_client.rs` — new file
- `/Users/4thwithme/Documents/repo/clui/rust/crates/agent/src/lib.rs` — added `cli_client` module + `CliAgentClient` re-export
- `/Users/4thwithme/Documents/repo/clui/rust/crates/app/src/agent_task.rs` — replaced `AgentClient`/`AgentConfig` with `CliAgentClient`, added `reset()` on Interrupt
- `/Users/4thwithme/Documents/repo/clui/rust/crates/app/src/main.rs` — removed API key gate, unconditional agent spawn
